How It Began

Written in the stars

Mid 2025 · The Beginning

When families played cupid

It all started the classic way—families connected, profiles were exchanged, and a “just one conversation” was planned. What no one expected? It wouldn’t feel like an introduction… it felt easy from the start.

Late 2025 · The Talking Phase

From “hello” to “tell me everything”

What began as polite conversations quickly turned into long calls, random laughter, and “just 5 more minutes” that lasted hours. Somewhere between daily updates and inside jokes, something real began to grow.

Early 2026 · The Realisation

This actually makes sense

Meetings turned into comfort, and comfort turned into certainty. What started as an arrangement slowly became a choice—one they both happily made.

2026 · Forever

The easiest yes

With families smiling in the background and hearts fully on board, Shashank and Neelam said yes to forever—proving that sometimes, the best love stories are the ones beautifully arranged.
